enrichment.summary: Kyle records a vlog from his deck on Labor Day 2015, discussing his decision to take a plea deal related to a marijuana DUI charge, which will require four months of sobriety and community service. He talks about plans for his website, redoing a sobriety test with edibles, and what he'll do while sober — including cycling without smoking weed first and making YouTube videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: accepting it as the more practical option over going to trial
current roadside tests are inadequate and should include functional tasks like yoga or speaking
curious and mildly optimistic about riding without smoking weed for the first time in years
resigned but productive — plans to use the time for YouTube videos and website work
